name: nymphaea lotus
mechanism: Likely mediated in part by flavonoid/polyphenol antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activity
effects: dreaming or folk medicine used in ritual
safetyNotes: Potentially toxic; avoid unsupervised use; Avoid use with cns depressants; Avoid with sedatives

sources.title: PubMed search: Nymphaea lotus L.

description: Nymphaea lotus is a medicinal herb traditionally used for relaxation and mild euphoria.
